rationale: Budget v5 — fixes argWindow bug in db_prepare_in_loop detector (was silently skipping dynamic-SQL preparations because the matched src ended at db.prepare(); now correctly slices forward into the actual SQL string). 36 newly-surfaced findings are bounded-dynamic patterns (template SQL with a small fixed input set, e.g. _batch-lookup.js helper); tracked for per-site annotation. Also rewires 31 fake-data findings to summary-only + per-site annotations (PR #347).
